case_title: TONY RAMIREZ VS. SHEER QUALITY APPLIANCES AND REPAIR L.L.C., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT SHEER QUALITY APPLIANCES AND REPAIR L.L.C., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEER QUALITY APPLIANCES AND REPAIR L.L.C., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $1,590.01 PRINCIPAL, $4.29 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,819.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
